Findings.Title: MFA is not enforced for all administrators
Findings.Detail: Multi-factor authentication is not enforced for all users with administrative roles. 3 out of 12 admin accounts do not have MFA registered.
Findings.Remediation: Create a Conditional Access policy requiring MFA for all administrative roles, or enable security defaults.

Findings.Title: Legacy authentication protocols are not blocked
Findings.Detail: Legacy authentication protocols (IMAP, POP3, SMTP) are not blocked by Conditional Access. Legacy protocols cannot enforce MFA and are a common attack vector.
Findings.Remediation: Create a Conditional Access policy to block legacy authentication for all users.

Findings.Title: Self-service password reset is enabled for all users
Findings.Detail: Self-service password reset (SSPR) is enabled for all users in the tenant, reducing helpdesk load and improving user experience.
